edges.rationale: behind camera, not visible in image; inferred entry wall
right wall with framed picture; obj_7/obj_13/obj_14 are on camera-right side
far wall behind bed with large multi-pane window; bed and nightstands sit against this wall
left wall with large window and framed art; obj_1/obj_3 are on camera-left side

rationale: Rectangular bedroom shot down its length. Camera is at origin looking +Y (~90 deg yaw in world frame). The hull is clearly rectangular with no concavities. Large window on far-left wall does NOT make an OPEN edge (windows are wall features). No visible doorway in frame; entry is behind camera. All objects including the bed (obj_4) and nightstands (obj_1/obj_2/obj_3) are enclosed with at least 0.1m clearance on every side.
